summary: Implemented dispatcher-side git worktree creation for Kanban worktree tasks. Worktrees now default to <repo>/.worktrees/task_<task_id> and use per-task branches kanban/task_<task_id>, allowing concurrent tasks to resolve separate directories without sharing the checked-out base branch.
notes: Existing unrelated uncommitted changes were present before this run in gateway/platforms/whatsapp.py, gateway/run.py, hermes_cli/kanban.py, uv.lock, gateway/kanban_summary.py, and .ai/.
This run intentionally touched only hermes_cli/kanban_db.py, tests/hermes_cli/test_kanban_db.py, and this implementation summary.
